Package lu.kbra.pclib.db.table

Class DataBaseTable<T extends DataBaseEntry>

java.lang.Object
lu.kbra.pclib.db.table.DataBaseTable<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
SQLHookable, SQLQueryable<T>, AbstractDBTable<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
DBTableProxy, DeferredDataBaseTable
public class DataBaseTable<T extends DataBaseEntry> extends Object implements AbstractDBTable<T>
